description: Starting with a BBA in Professional Accountancy, I developed a keen eye for logic and precision—skills that later fueled my data science passion. As a Senior Auditor at EY, I applied logic to ensure financial integrity, but the repetitive nature made me yearn for innovation. Data was everywhere, yet untapped for bigger problems.
hint: When you realise accounting is just data in disguise

milestones.title: BBA in Professional Accountancy
milestones.subtitle: The Chinese University of Hong Kong

description: Why the change? Auditing's structured world felt limiting—I wanted to harness data for real impact, like predicting trends or automating decisions. Logic became my tool for building, not just checking. The Xccelerate bootcamp was my leap into data science, blending my analytical background with coding creativity.
hint: When you realise 'Data Science' is not black magic, we need to learn a lot of math and coding

description: Now as an AI Engineer, I love how data reveals patterns in chaos, logic solves complex puzzles, and real-life applications like AI-driven insights transform businesses.
hint: When your code finally runs and predicts the future

description: Pursuing an MS in Data Science at CU Boulder deepens my passion for data, logic, and real-life applications.

milestones.title: Master of Science in Data Science
milestones.subtitle: University of Colorado Boulder
